recommendations.title: Purple Hearts
recommendations.overview: An aspiring musician agrees to a marriage of convenience with a soon-to-deploy Marine, but a tragedy soon turns their fake relationship all too real.

recommendations.title: Ramona and Beezus
recommendations.overview: Ramona is a little girl with a very big imagination and a nose for mischief. Her playful antics keep everyone in her loving family on their toes, including her older sister Beezus, who's just trying to survive her first year of high school. Through a

recommendations.title: Aquamarine

recommendations.title: Criminal Activities
recommendations.overview: Four young men make a risky investment together that gets them into trouble with the mob.

recommendations.title: Demolition
recommendations.overview: An emotionally desperate investment banker finds hope through a woman he meets.

recommendations.title: Double Indemnity
recommendations.overview: An insurance representative is seduced by a dissatisfied housewife into a scheme of insurance fraud and murder that arouses the suspicion of his colleague, a claims investigator.

recommendations.title: Good Advice
recommendations.overview: An investment banker loses everything and must discover what's really important in life.

recommendations.title: Bed of Roses
recommendations.overview: The seeds of love are planted when Lisa, a high-powered investment banker, receives flowers from a secret admirer. But when his fairy-tale fantasies clash with her workaholic ways, they soon find out that sometimes, it's harder than it seems for love

recommendations.title: A Matador's Mistress
recommendations.overview: Scandal erupts over a famous bullfighter's affair with a left-wing actress.

recommendations.title: Boiler Room
recommendations.overview: A college dropout gets a job as a broker for a suburban investment firm and is on the fast track to success—but the job might not be as legitimate as it sounds.
